headline: Assessing Visa (V) Valuation After The New Ingenico Payments Partnership
summary: Why the Ingenico partnership has Visa (V) back in focus Visa (V) is back on many watchlists after announcing a collaboration with Ingenico that links Ingenico's AXIUM smart POS terminals to the Visa Acceptance Platform, including gateway and risk management services. This tie up aims to shorten time to market for merchants, simplify in store payment certifications, and support omnichannel use cases across enterprise retail, small and medium businesses, restaurants, and third party...
